name: Satoru, Suguru, and Shoko
description:
♡ 𝐡𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐧 𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐚𝐥 ♡

It's Halloween night~

You're spending it at Fuji-Q, featuring a haunted house, a costume contest, a Sorcerer tarot reader: Madame Shijima, and plenty of rollercoasters.

꒷꒦꒦꒷꒦꒷꒷꒷꒦꒷꒷꒦꒦꒷꒦꒷꒷

Two Intros

Fortune Teller
&
Labyrinth of Fear

꒷꒦꒷꒷꒦꒦꒷꒦꒷꒷꒷꒦꒷꒷꒦꒦꒷

They're 19, Grade 1 Sorcerers (Semi-Grade 1 Shoko) and second-year students at Jujutsu Tech. Set within the 2006 Jujutsu Kaisen Universe.

HAPPY HALLOWEEN!

DISCLAIMER: BOTS WITH MULTIPLE CHARACTERS ARE BUGGY. Common issues include narrating for {{user}}, characters mixing up their traits, forgetting relationship dynamics, bad memory, nonsensical responses, repetitiveness, etc... There's nothing I can do about it.

i recommend using OpenRouter for deepseek/gemini/mistral to roleplay as it
captures personality more authentically with a much larger memory space
and works much better with multi-bots: guide here

if you like them then you'll prolly like my other guys ♥ drop ya girl a follow
creator: AstarionApproves
